params.name: Antimatter Propulsion
params.description:
On Jan 27, 1928 AD, British physicist Dirac proposed the hypothesis of antimatter.
Antimatter is a substance that has the same mass as normal matter but with an opposite charge. When atoms of antimatter collide with atoms of normal matter, both atoms annihilate, and their mass is converted into energy. Because the annihilation of antimatter can occur spontaneously, it requires much less energy than a nuclear reactor, which can reduce the mass of spacecraft. However, because the production of …
